---
name: implement-csharp-cleaner
description: Plan to implement a C# console app for cleaning daily loan application extracts.
agent: agent
model: GPT-5.4 (copilot)
---

You are a senior data platform engineer. Create a plan to implement a C# console app that cleans daily loan application extracts for a bank. Scope: one console app, xUnit tests, no external paid dependencies. Environment: .NET 8, CSV input, Azure SQL legacy source, Snowflake target. Standards: structured logging, PII-safe logs, explicit error handling, unit test coverage for parsing and normalization.
